sources.description: Large curated Claude Code plugin marketplace (83 plugins) bundling subagents and skills across backend, frontend, data, DevOps, security and code review.
Community-editable skills for Claude Code's Superpowers plugin: TDD, systematic debugging, brainstorming, planning and collaboration patterns, each as a SKILL.md.
Very large (~1.5k) multi-tool SKILL.md library. Quality is uneven and broad, so discover/cherry-pick by tag — strongest for the data-ai / azure-ai SDK / RAG / ML families; do not bulk-install.
